mustPass: Every page has a clear purpose.
Homepage contains a concrete product-led value proposition, not generic shop copy.
Primary CTA on the homepage routes to /produkter.
Product grid items are concrete - no lorem ipsum, no placeholder cards.
All routes from routes.json are present.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Filter bars that pretend to filter without real data behind them.
Cart or checkout UI - those are hard Dossiers and not part of Sprint 2B output.
Random color choices not derived from variant tokens.
Forms or features that fail at build because of missing env.
